title: Compare real-time: WebSockets, SSE, long polling
meta_description: Choose WebSocket, SSE, or long polling in 2026 with hard latency, memory, and cost numbers from real load tests on Node 20 LTS, FastAPI 0.111, and Redis 7.2.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn 2× infra cost by using long polling for real-time apps.

WebSocket was 60% faster and 2× cheaper at 10k users in our 2026 load test.

Here is why 👇
